item.title:
WeAreWST: WST @WeAreWST · 1min HISTORY!
The moment Antoni Kowalski became the first Polish player to make the Crucible!
#Judge
item.description:
WST @WeAreWST · 1min HISTORY!
The moment Antoni Kowalski became the first Polish player to make the Crucible!
#JudgementDay 2 13 301

item.title: GWSnookerTips: George Weyham @GWSnookerTips · 2min He has got some bottle Cita Matt @ProSnookerBlog · 3min HUGE win for Antoni Kowalsk
item.description: George Weyham @GWSnookerTips · 2min He has got some bottle Cita Matt @ProSnookerBlog · 3min HUGE win for Antoni Kowalski to not only become the first Polish player to qualify for the Crucible, but to save his Tour card in the process #TourSurvival 3 38

item.title: ProSnookerBlog: Matt @ProSnookerBlog · 3min HUGE win for Antoni Kowalski to not only become the first Polish player to qualify for the C
item.description: Matt @ProSnookerBlog · 3min HUGE win for Antoni Kowalski to not only become the first Polish player to qualify for the Crucible, but to save his Tour card in the process #TourSurvival 2 9 134
